name: Fetta Col Cavolo, Olio Nuovo and Pecorino Fresco
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch to 14-inch saute pan, heat the oil and garlic together until the garlic starts to lightly brown.
2. Add all the chopped kale at once and stir to move the garlic from the bottom of the pan.
3. Cover and cook for 8-10 minutes until the kale is soft.
4. Meanwhile, grill the bread slices.
5. Rub each grilled slice with raw garlic.
6. Place a slice in each shallow bowl.
7. Top each slice with a large spoonful of the cooked kale mixture.
8. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil and shave pecorino cheese using a peeler.
9. Serves: 4 as antipasto
